<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This project is a beginner-friendly Python tool for intelligent log anomaly detection in microservices. Prioritize clear, step-by-step Jupyter notebook code with explanations. Emphasize TF-IDF vectorization, RandomForest classification, and practical ML workflows for real-world log analysis.
